title: Vanilla Rebalanced
description: A subtle overhaul of Minecraft's lacking features, in the vanilla style.
body:
A fabric modpack for 1.19.2 that revamps a lot of aspects of the game, including:
- Transport (Elytra, Minecarts)
- Enchanting
- Bundles
- Structures
- Keeping gear, tools, etc, on death, but not resources
- Numerous other small additions
- Visual tweaks

This pack might not be for everyone, but personally I think it leaves the game much more balanced and enjoyable.

Notable mods:
- Aileron
- Enchancement
- Supplementaries & Charm, both heavily trimmed
- YUNG's various structure reworks

Credit to Vanilla Tweaks for the included resource pack & crafting recipe tweaks.
